Elevated Faith: I'm so sorry to hear that! I've reviewed your Order #1560006 and can confirm that your package is currently being processed for shipment. Please note that all orders are processed within 1-2 business days, and we usually ship via UPS or USPS. Once shipped it will take 3-7 business days domestically and 14-40 business days internationally. We also offer 2 day shipping, if you need it sooner. At this point, the best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@elevatedfaith.com. Our team is happy to help!

Comfrt: I'm really sorry if you felt that way. We're not a scam; in fact, we have many customers who are satisfied with our service. About the order that wasn't delivered, is it the order from December 3rd? 

My access is limited, but if it's not a pre-ordered item(s). you can reach out to our customer support team directly via email: info@comfrt.com. Our team is happy to help!

send_to_cs: Don't ESC post-purchase issues, use PPI shortcut
templates: For wrong items received use WMP shortcut
For damaged items received use DMI shortcut
For order status requests use OSR shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: The welcome code is valid for first-time customers only.
➜ Can't be combined with any other discounts or offers, including sale styles
➜  Use cww temp for code issues
The promotional price shown on the Heydude website may not always be guaranteed when cx is redirected to Prime for purchase if the item is out of stock

State Line Tack: Hey, this is Sarah. Thanks for checking out our site! https://slt.attn.tv/aCFQxtHDJpsf

Are you looking for anything in particular today?
No.   When I click on the picture with the shown price, I see the blanket with a much higher price!!!  Not good!

State Line Tack: Please add the item to your cart to see if the discount applies. Some items may not be eligible for discounts due to manufacturer policies. If issues persist, please provide a screenshot.

Price does not change to what's pictured.  I'd fix this if I were stateline; it looks like you're trying to scam people.   
Now I don't want to buy any.

State Line Tack: I understand your concern. Our prices are subject to change but you're still getting a great deal with the discounted price of $87.42. We really appreciate your feedback as we continuously improve our customer experience.

No, No and NO!!   In truth, you can't advertise one price and charge a higher one.   If you click on size 69, the price changes from $67 to $127! "Truth in advertising" doesn't pertain to Stateline?  I ought to put this out on my competition groups' pages.

State Line Tack: Thank you for sharing that with me. I understand how seeing the price change when selecting a size can be confusing. Prices and promotions can vary by size and are subject to change without notice, and some products are excluded from discounts. I really appreciate you bringing this to our attention, and I'll be forwarding your feedback to our team so they can review the listing and pricing display.

promotions.title: 30% OFF Floral Collection
content:
30% Off Floral Collection

Valid 3/3/26 12am PT through 3/5/26 11:59pm PT

No promo code required; discount will automatically apply in cart on valid items

Valid items are in this collection: https://thehappyplanner.com/collections/florals

Reward redemptions cannot be used if automatic discount is in cart.

promotions.title: VIPSHIPPING
content:
FREE SHIPPING NO MINIMUM FOR REWARD MEMBERS | USE CODE: VIPSHIPPING

Valid 3/10/26 12am PT through 3/12/26 11:59pm PT

- Promo code: VIPSHIPPING must be entered at checkout to receive free shipping

- Customer must be signed into their reward member account in order for promo code to work. Non-members can join for free and take advantage of this promotion.

- Free shipping is for standard ground methods, and within the Contiguous US only

- Reward redemptions can be used with the free shipping code.

promotions.title: Secret Sale up to 70% OFF
content:
Up to 70% Off Secret Sale + Free Shipping with Custom Planners

Valid 1/21/26 12am PT through 1/28/26 11:59pm PT

- No promo code; prices as marked. 

- Secret Sale items in this collection: https://thehappyplanner.com/collections/secret-sale

- Free standard shipping will appear as an option in valid carts that have a custom planner in cart. Valid for orders shipping within the Contiguous only. 

- Reward Redemptions are combinable with the Secret Sale

promotions.title: SMS VIP EXCLUSIVE
content:
25% OFF + FREE SHIPPING for SMS customers who received the promotional text. 

PROMO CODE GIVE IS UNIQUE TO EACH SUBSCRIBER.

CUSTOM PLANNERS ARE EXCLUDED FROM DISCOUNT. 

FREE SHIPPING PROMOTION ONLY VALID FOR ORDERS SHIPPING WITHIN THE CONTIGUOUS US.

ENDS 11:59PM ON 1/30/2026

promotions.title: 30% OFF Galentine's Day
content:
30% Off Select BFF Items + $2 Shipping

Valid 2/13/26 12am PT through 11:59pm PT

No promo code required; discount will automatically apply in cart on valid items

Valid items are in this collection: https://thehappyplanner.com/collections/bff-collection

$2 Shipping will be an option in cart. Valid only on ground methods, within the Contiguous US

Reward Redemptions cannot be used if the 
30% discount is applied in cart.

Cannot be combined with any other sale, promotion, discount, coupon, and/or offers

promotions.title: End of Season Sale - up to 85% OFF
content:
Up to 85% OFF End of Season Sale + Free Shipping over $50*

Promotion ends at 11:59pm PST on 2/19/26

- Prices are as marked. No promo code required.
- Free shipping is for orders over $50 and shipping within the contiguous US only
- Rewards are eligible on select items and in combination with the end of season sale

promotions.title: GAMEPLAN25
content:
25% Off Orders + Free Shipping
Valid 2/8/26 12am PT through 11:59pm PT

25% Off Orders with Code: GAMEPLAN25

Promo code must be entered in cart in order for discount to apply.

25% OFF promotion is excluded on Custom Planners (Build Your Own).

Free shipping will be an option in valid carts

Free shipping is within the Contiguous US Only, on standard ground methods

Reward redemptions cannot be combined with 25% OFF discount.

promotions.title: BUY MORE, SAVE MORE SALE
content:
Buy More, Save More Sitewide
Valid 12/8/25 9am PT through 12/12/25 11:59pm PT

Spend $75+, Get 15% Off
Spend $100+, Get 20% Off
Spend $150+, Get 25% Off

- Discount automatically applied in cart based on cart thresholds
- Custom Planner are excluded from the promo and do not count towards the thresholds
- Reward redemptions can be used but are excluded from custom planners.

promotions.title: NATIONAL STICKER DAY SALE
content:
NATIONAL STICKER DAY
1/13/26 12am PT through 1/15/26 11:59pm PT

URL: https://thehappyplanner.com/collections/national-sticker-day

Promos:
- 7 Select Sticker Books for $29.99
- 5 Select Sticker Sheets for $8.99
- 25% Off all other Stickers


No promo code; discounts will automatically apply in cart based on skus

All skus that are part of the 7 sticker book bundle and 5 sticker sheet bundles will be 25% Off until the quantity thresholds are met, and then will automatically switch to the bundle pricing.

Exclusions apply. Cannot be combined with any other sale, promotion, discount, coupon, and/or offers.

Reward redemptions can not be used if discount is applied in cart.

important: Make sure links you're sending customers are for THE HAPPY PLANNER!
Example of what NOT to send: thehappinessplanner.com (The Happiness Planner is completely different company)
tone: Use a more upbeat, but professional tone
promo_and_exclusions: 🅿️ Promote customers to sign up to Happy Rewards, use RWD shortcut
DON'T ask customers to check their email if they didn't get the code for signing up for emails & texts OR for spinning the wheel! The code should be in the texts!
Custom Planners and Specialty Packs are excluded from discount codes
old_expired_codes: Please do not send old or expired codes to subscribers. This includes recycling old codes that may have previously gone to the sub and is no longer valid.
